title: Adding a clock in and out for employees
excerpt: I think it would be great if there could be a clock in and out feature.

posts.author: OnwenuPM (Crystal Onwenu)
posts.cookedHtml: I think it would be great if there could be a clock in and out feature.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Crystal,

Could our time-tracking feature help you achieve this goal? Employees simply can start/stop the time-tracking at the beginning/end of their shift?

Let me know what you think
